历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 19059 → 48210 (abnormal gap in 2022) → 28244 → 27956 → 30209. In the recent three years, the overall range is 28,000–30,000. The 2025 baseline is about 30209, which is about 2253 places lower than 2024, showing a downward trend. The university's enrollment plan in Anhui for Physics Category was 116 in 2021, 127 in 2022, 128 in 2023, 140 in 2024, 141 in 2025, and 143 in 2026. It has been slightly expanding for several consecutive years. In 2026, it increased by 2 compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 1.4%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked about 76th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable at 76–77 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management or response incidents, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity not in the top 100, attention is average. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a somewhat negative evaluation in 2022 due to teacher ethics incidents, but it has subsided in recent years. Reference to the fifth round of discipline evaluation of China University of Mining and Technology (Xuzhou): Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-. The two universities share the same origin, with similar disciplinary strengths. Mining Engineering and Safety Engineering are traditional advantageous directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence have high social popularity/recommendation, driving up competition for related majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Anhui is about 451,000, slightly lower than 2025 (about 462,000), slightly reducing competitive pressure. The university is located in Beijing, which has a certain regional appeal to Anhui candidates. In recent years, the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 2.8% (2025), with stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the downward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+2 people), and the slight decrease in total candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 30209, competition is expected to slightly intensify. The predicted minimum ranking is about 30666, with a range of 30166–31166.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 30166–31166, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 30166), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 31166), you should mainly consider Tier 3 advantageous disciplines such as Safety Science and Engineering Category and Surveying and Mapping Category, while also considering Tier 2 majors.
